subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth the truth and announceth unto the world the Most Great Name, Who hath come from the horizon of might with the banners of verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینطق بالحق و یبشر العالم بالاسم الاعظم الذی اتی من افق الاقتدار برایات الایات
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat]
